'''Zonju V''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]], rimward of [[Rutan/Legends|Rutan]]. Its terrain consisted of shallow, dusty, scrubby, sparsely-foliated [[canyon]]s and gorges; littered with deserted ruins carved from sandstone rock. The [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] was [[Zoronhed]].

==History==
[[File:ZonjuVLandscape1.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Barren landscape of Zonju V around [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]].]]
In [[3640 BBY]],<ref name="Encyclopedia">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic Encyclopedia]]''</ref> a powerful chieftain was searching for his family's lost crown so he could secure his bid for the planet's throne.<ref name="Moving Up in the World">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Treasure Hunting|Moving Up in the World}}</ref>

In [[14 ABY/Legends|14 ABY]], the canyons of Zonju V were a lawless area plagued by gangs of [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] on [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] bikes. The [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jaden Korr]] was sent on a [[Mission to Zonju V|mission]] to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in order to make contact with a [[Unidentified spaceport worker|spaceport worker]] living outside of the [[City/Legends|city]] within one of the old ruins to receive information from him about the [[Disciples of Ragnos]]. But before the worker could tell Korr anything; he was shot [[Death/Legends|dead]] by one of the mercenaries. Korr was then forced to embark on a ride through the canyons on a [[swoop]] of [[Gender/Legends|his]] [[Flare-S swoop/Legends|own]] back to Zoronhed while being pursued by the swoop gangs, who were possibly in the employ of the Disciples. He then departed the world in his [[Z-95 Headhunter/Legends|personal starfighter]], the [[Far Wanderer]].<ref name="JKA">''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Jedi Academy]]''</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
